product: Recently Resolved Incidents section in Data Quality Monitoring (Beta)
tagline: The Data Quality Monitoring dashboard now includes a Recently Resolved Incidents section, currently in Beta.
what_it_does: The Data Quality Monitoring dashboard now includes a Recently Resolved Incidents section, currently in Beta. This section shows tables that were previously unhealthy but have since automatically recovered to a healthy status, including the time of resolution. Use this view to identify self healing data quality issues and confirm that known problems have been fixed.
why_it_matters: Intelligent scanning prioritizes high impact tables as determined by popularity and downstream usage, and reduces frequency for less critical tables.
key_takeaway: The Data Quality Monitoring dashboard now includes a Recently Resolved Incidents section, currently in Beta.
